verdict_reason: The four properties — avināśin, nitya, aja, avyaya — are each preserved with a distinct engineering analog (indestructible/eternal/unborn/undecaying mapped to spec/contract/protocol/abstraction). The Shankara/Ramanuja split is honoured: Shankara's general-denial-of-agency reading appears in 'the realised builder cannot be agent at the implementation layer'; Ramanuja's 'cause the death of any embodied self' reading appears as the framing that swapping a Postgres function for a Kafka stream destroys nothing essential because the contract walks on undisturbed (i.e., the embodied selves continue across body-changes). The disagreements_among_translators field correctly flags both readings without conflating them. The puruṣaḥ-as-realised-knower reading (which is Advaita-load-bearing) is preserved without being claimed exclusively for Advaita — the engineering analog uses 'realised craftsperson' as a register that both Shankara and Ramanuja can endorse. No tradition is dropped or merged. PASS.
